modifications: Default WebAssembly initial memory reduced from 2048 MiB to 512 MiB.
Fixed 120-thread worker pool replaced by a wrapper-controlled pool capped at four workers.
Interprocedural optimization disabled; Ninja compilation, Emscripten and Binaryen subprocesses, and wasm-ld pinned to one job on the immutable container filesystem for byte reproducibility.
Browser builds initialize repositories synchronously and leave the inhibited preloader before starting the Emscripten loop.
Browser canvas resize recovers from SDL's transient hidden or zero-size setup state.
The Emscripten hardware renderer selects a supported four-byte texture and resets its viewport after resize.
The native title-menu scenario callback opens the matching verified ParkworksLibrary snapshot and fails closed when a school-library entry is missing.
